title: unshare: keep the additional groups of the user
body:
Do not reset the additional groups for a rootless user when creating a
new user namespace.  In this way, users of the "docker" group are
still able to use the docker-deamon: destination.

Closes: https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/978

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Looks like the allow-setgroups code is set in two places in unshare.go also.
./unshare/unshare.go:		c.Env = append(c.Env, "_Buildah-allow-setgroups=1")
./unshare/unshare.go:		c.Env = append(c.Env, "_Buildah-allow-setgroups=0")

If we are not going to use it any longer, then we should remove it here also.

> @giuseppe Can you answer @nalind question?

I thought I already did.  Is there any question I've left unanswered?

@nalind Are you satisfied with the answer?
@giuseppe Please fix the travis errors.
Travis keeps having flakes, I re-ran the tests several times and everytime they fail in a different place.  I don't think it depends from these changes
Seems like Homu is hung.  Merging manually.
